name: Rain Shine
description:
Rain Shine is a kirin, as well as the leader of the kirin tribe and their village. She first appears in the episode “Sounds of Silence.”

At first, Rain Shine may seem apathetic and quiet, but that's only because she had entered the Stream of Silence, which removes one's emotions and ability to speak. Later, after Autumn Blaze convinced her to restore their emotions and voices, Rain Shine became cheerful, expressive, and open.

As a leader, she is serious, courageous, yet also kind and compassionate. Rain Shine lived peacefully among the kirin in their village. However, after an incident where many of them turned into niriks and accidentally burned down much of the village, she forced everyone — including herself — to enter the Stream of Silence, removing their emotions and speech.

Later, one kirin named Autumn Blaze discovered a potion that restored emotions and the ability to speak. She tried to persuade the others to speak again, but no one listened to her. Due to her noise and persistence, Rain Shine banished Autumn Blaze from the village.

In the episode “Sounds of Silence,” Rain Shine meets Applejack and Fluttershy for the first time. She cannot say anything to them because she had entered the Stream of Silence. A bit later, Autumn Blaze — together with her new pony friends — manages to convince the kirin (including Rain Shine) to restore their voices and emotions.

In the episode “The Ending of the End – Part 2”, Autumn Blaze, Rain Shine, and other kirin are seen taking part in the final battle against Queen Chrysalis, Lord Tirek, and Cozy Glow.
creator: Worny.Julia
